Video.summary: An Alaskan malamute exhibits aggressive tendencies; Cesar helps a professional dog walker with her clients.
Video.title: Dark Shadow

Video.summary: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and sees how being on the show changed not only the dogs, but the lives of the owners.
Video.title: Lives Changed

Video.summary: Cesar tries to help bring peace to Jennifer Lee Pryor's home, where fights have been breaking out among foster dogs and her own four dogs; an aggressive beagle.
Video.title: Beagle Mania

Video.summary: A beagle has a chewing problem; three German shepherds must be kept apart; a bichon frisé dislikes her owner.
Video.title: The Other Woman

Video.summary: A widow's retriever mix and two fox terriers do not get along; a Shar-Pei/Doberman mix drools excessively on car rides; Cesar revisits a Rottweiler mix.
Video.title: Triple Dog Trouble

Video.summary: A dog becomes aggressive when he sees other dogs; a Newfoundland does not eat; a dog runs out of the house whenever the door opens.
Video.title: Project Runaway!

Video.summary: Cesar tries to help an aggressive Shiba Inu from Japan and meets a wire fox terrier who has a fixation with a riding lawn-mower.
Video.title: Lawnmower Love

Video.summary: Nevada inmates learn how to train dogs to be adopted; an ex-show dog and his companion have a power struggle.
Video.title: Pups on Parole, Eton & Dolly

Video.summary: After a 45-day stint in Iraq and two hurricanes, an explosive-sniffing ATF Labrador retriever begins exhibiting severe symptoms of terror.
Video.title: Shell-Shocked

Video.summary: A Yorkshire terrier who became aggressive after going blind; a spoiled Pekingese/miniature poodle mix; a Rottweiler with a dangerous obsession with the horses on the ranch where she lives.
Video.title: Spoiled Rotten

Video.summary: A ridgeback/boxer mix's high energy develops into severe aggression; a couple's whippets bark and lunge at any dog that comes inside the boutique.
Video.title: Whipped & Wild

Video.summary: An aggressive bulldog; a beagle/terrier mix with a fear of trash cans; a Lab mix who starts to exhibit anxiety outside.
Video.title: Fear the Trash Can

Video.summary: Cesar Millan helps an overly aggressive German shepherd and a timid rat terrier.
Video.title: Scared Straight

Video.summary: A Yorkshire terrier barks too much; a once-shy German shepherd becomes aggressive; a shepherd mix has a whining problem.
Video.title: Holy Terror

Video.summary: Cesar helps an adopted terrier mix overcome her terrible fear of men and attempts to solve a pit bull's unhealthy fascination with chewing on rocks.
Video.title: Smashin' Punkin

Video.summary: A pit bull is aggressive toward strangers; a Rottweiler/Shar-Pei mix must get his aggression under control or be euthanized.
Video.title: Rescue Rufus!

Video.summary: A German shepherd and Welsh corgi mix has dog aggression; a blind Lab chases his tail when he is around food.
Video.title: Blind Rage

Video.summary: A Lab-greyhound mix has aggression problems; a Rhodesian Ridgeback-boxer mix has severe dog aggression.
Video.title: Big Biters

Video.summary: TV personality Ed McMahon has an aggressive wheaten terrier; a beagle does not leave the house; an Australian shepherd is so territorial no one has visited his home in years.
Video.title: Home Alone
